name: Italian Herbed Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Loose-packed frozen hash brown potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, stir together green onions, margarine, parsley flakes, Italian seasoning, and salt.
2. Cook, covered on high, for 1 minute 30 seconds or 100% power.
3. Stir in frozen potatoes. Cook, covered, on high for 5 to 7 minutes, stirring once until heated through.
4. Add Parmesan cheese; toss to coat.
